tests.comment: golden PING on Control channel, seq 0 (vectors.json)
reserved octet 25 set to 0x01 (CRC over octets 0-20 unaffected)
encode the golden PING header from its fields
TLV type 0x8001 has the high bit set: forward-incompatible, MUST be rejected
tampered GCM tag (last nibble flipped) MUST fail authentication
